title: Vertical turn navigation rail component with active state indicators
purpose: Provides a sticky left rail with clickable dots that allow users to jump to specific turns in a conversation, with visual indication of the currently active turn.
module_context: Exports a React functional component TurnRail that accepts turns array, active turn ID, and jump handler as props. Also exports the TurnRailTurn and TurnRailProps interfaces for type safety.

steps.content: Render a navigation container with sticky positioning and centered alignment.
Map over the provided turns array to generate individual turn buttons.
For each turn, determine if it matches the active turn ID.
Create a button element for each turn with appropriate styling based on active state.
Attach click handler to jump to the corresponding turn when clicked.
Set accessibility attributes including label and current state indicator.
